steps.title: Focus on the nickname
steps.content: The student wants an example of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname. The relevant note says the Great Plains Dinosaur Museum and Field Station houses a specimen nicknamed Eleanor, which is a member of the genus Brachylophosaurus.

steps.title: Keep the example specific
steps.content: Choice A only gives a general statement about museums and nicknames. Choice B mentions a museum in Malta, Montana, but omits the nickname. Choice D mentions the genus and museum but also omits the nickname. The remaining choice names Eleanor and identifies the specimen and museum, giving the requested example. The answer is C.
